title: ipomoea woronovii var. lutea
intro: Ipomoea woronovii var. lutea, also known as yellow morning glory, is a plant species in the Convolvulaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. Ipomoea woronovii var. lutea has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
